zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Clinton於1285年出生在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾時，她的父親Sir John de Clinton54歲，母親Isabel53歲。她於1301年與Sir Ralph de Grendon在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1329年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾格倫登享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Clinton于1285年出生在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾时，她的父亲Sir John de Clinton54岁，母亲Isabel53岁。她于1301年与Sir Ralph de Grendon在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1329年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾格倫登享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clinton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Louth, Westmeath) and Scottish: shortened form of   McClinton  .

English: habitational name, either from Glympton in Oxfordshire, named as ‘settlement (Old English tūn) on the Glym river’, a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright stream’, or from Glinton in Northamptonshire, early recorded as Clinton (named with an unrecorded Old English element akin to Middle Low German glinde ‘enclosure, fence’ + Old English tūn). The surname was taken to Ireland in or before the 16th century.

History: Charles Clinton (born 1690 in Longford, Ireland) organized a group of colonists and founded the settlement of Little Britain, Ulster County, NY, in 1731. His son George Clinton (1739–1812) was governor of NY (1777–95), and they had many prominent descendants. — An English aristocratic family called Clinton was founded by Geoffrey de Clinton (flourished 1130), who held lands at Glympton, Oxfordshire. He was chamberlain and treasurer to Henry I (1100–35).

variants.name: McClinton
meanings: Irish (northern) and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Fhionntain (Scottish), Mac Giolla Fhionntáin (Irish) ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) Fionntan’, whose name has been explained as ‘the white ancient’.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Clinton was born in 1285, in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John de Clinton, was 54 and her mother, Isabel, was 53. She married Sir Ralph de Grendon in 1301, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in 1329, in Grendon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Clinton est née en 1285, à Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John de Clinton, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Isabel, avait 53 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph de Grendon en 1301, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1329, à Grendon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Clinton 1285 in Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John de Clinton 54 und ihre Mutter Isabel 53. Sie hat 1301 in England, United Kingdom Sir Ralph de Grendon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1329 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Grendon, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Clinton è nata il nel 1285 nel Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John de Clinton, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Isabel, aveva 53 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ralph de Grendon nel 1301, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1329, nel Grendon, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Clintonが1285年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John de Clintonは54歳，母Isabelは53歳であった。1301年にイギリスイギリスでSir Ralph de Grendonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1329年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアグレンドンで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Clinton(이)가 1285년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Clinton(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel(은)는 53세였다. 그녀는 1301년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Sir Ralph de Grendon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1329년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 그렌던에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Clinton родилась в 1285 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John de Clinton было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel, 53. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph de Grendon в 1301 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1329 г. в местности грендон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Clinton nació en 1285, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John de Clinton, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Isabel, tenía 53 años.
